title: Glassbox project update
summary:
This week I worked on Phase 2 of Glassbox. I updated the feature extractor to 366 dimensions. Added FFT phase features and Savitzky-Golay smoothing to help with noisy data. I retrained the classifier to version 3 and got 0.96 F1 score. 

I also finished the PCFG formula generator. It can now make random formulas using 9 unary and 3 binary operators. Added 7 noise profiles like Gaussian and pink noise to test the model robustness. Fixed a constant handling bug where scalar broadcasting was failing and causing NaN in skew/kurtosis. 

Cleaned up old files and removed legacy benchmarks. Everything is running with the new CLI options now. All tests are passing.
commitMessages: feat(Phase 2B): PCFG formula generator + multi-SNR noise injection
feat: Add symbolic regression benchmark suite script and updated research roadmap documentation.
feat: Phase 2A feature extraction improvements + retrain classifier v3
chore: remove legacy benchmarking and GPU optimization modules
